rule_name: Potential OGNL Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application

text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%org.apache.commons.ognl.ognlexception%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%expressionsyntaxexception%' AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Moti Harmats SIGMA Title: Potential OGNL Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application SIGMA Description: Detects potential OGNL Injection exploitation, which may lead to RCE. OGNL is an expression language that is supported in many JVM based systems. OGNL Injection is the reason for some high profile RCE's such as Apache Struts (CVE-2017-5638) and Confluence (CVE-2022-26134)   False positives: - Application bugs  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Potential OGNL Injection Exploitation In JVM Based Application
